name: Saviynt Empty Access Groups
description: Detects empty groups in saviynt that may indicate stale access governance artifacts.
query: SELECT g.id AS id, g.display_name AS group_name FROM saviynt_groups g LEFT JOIN saviynt_group_memberships m ON g.id = m.group_id WHERE m.group_id IS NULL
remediation: Delete stale groups or document their future purpose and ownership before retaining them.
